_comment: External-repo capture template (Phase A). Drop into any project repo's .claude/ to (1) inject this project's BrunOS context at SessionStart and (2) route SessionEnd + PreCompact transcripts into BrunOS/Memory/_inbox/sessions/<project>/. Replace <project> and <default-export>; the SessionStart --context-file=<context-file> is OPTIONAL (a Memory/-relative path like projects/foo.md) — drop that flag if there's no consolidated file. Absolute paths assume Bruno's Mac (~/Documents/brunOS-brain); on VPS or Lisa's machine, swap the BRUNOS_REPO path. SessionStart always injects SOUL.md + USER.md (identity + Bruno's profile) plus the per-project context + recent captures, but NOT MEMORY/daily/HEARTBEAT/HABITS (the full-vault dump is session-start-context.py, BrunOS-self only).
